h2: Revive your space and save up to $650 when you upgrade your old wood-burning fireplace to a beautiful, easy-to-use gas insert. Offer ends May 1, 2026.
Build Smarter With The ProAdvantage Trade Program
Six Fireplace + TV Wall Designs That Get It Right

paragraphs: Revive your space and save up to $650 when you upgrade your old wood-burning fireplace to a beautiful, easy-to-use gas insert. Offer ends May 1, 2026.

Transform your wood-burning fireplace into a source of everyday comfort. A gas insert fits right inside your existing fireplace, delivering consistent heat, no cleanup, and a cozy atmosphere at the touch of a button. Perfect for chilly spring mornings, rainy afternoons, and relaxed evenings at home. Save up to $650 for a limited time.
This isn’t just access; it’s advantage. Get exclusive incentives, tools and support when you sign up for the ProAdvantage Trade Program. It’s quick to join and benefits start right away.
Tired of having to choose between the two? These projects prove that fireplaces and TVs can coexist beautifully, thanks to heat management technology and thoughtful design.
